inputs.label: Ion 1 Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the first ion in solution

inputs.label: Ion 1 Charge
inputs.businessContext: Charge number of the first ion (e.g., Na+ = 1, Ca2+ = 2)

inputs.label: Ion 2 Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the second ion in solution

inputs.label: Ion 2 Charge
inputs.businessContext: Charge number of the second ion (enter 0 if not used)

inputs.label: Ion 3 Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the third ion in solution

inputs.label: Ion 3 Charge
inputs.businessContext: Charge number of the third ion (enter 0 if not used)

inputs.label: Ion 4 Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of the fourth ion in solution

inputs.label: Ion 4 Charge
inputs.businessContext: Charge number of the fourth ion (enter 0 if not used)

formulas.ionicStrength: 0.5 * (concentration1 * charge1**2 + concentration2 * charge2**2 + concentration3 * charge3**2 + concentration4 * charge4**2)
